title: Key Considerations for Conducting Research at MSU — D-RED Seminar Slides (Silver)
display_label: Key Considerations for Conducting Research at MSU Slides (2022-08-11)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-08-11 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Key Considerations for Conducting Research at MSU' presented by Gillian Silver (MPH, CPH, CRA). High-level orientation covering the major decision points researchers face at MSU.
